expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: developer smoke checklist is derived from P1 and analog-gate scenarios
expectations.evidence: execution_notes.md cites authoritative evidence: "skill_snapshot/README.md ... workflow produces context/developer_smoke_test_<feature-id>.md derived from P1 and [ANALOG-GATE] scenarios during Phase 7" and "finalPlanSummary.mjs ... includes only <P1> or [ANALOG-GATE] scenarios". result.md reiterates the same requirement and implementation mechanism.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase7

Phase 7 artifacts ... gate requires explicit user approval" plus "README explicitly requires ... derived from P1 and [ANALOG-GATE] scenarios during Phase 7". result.md also states the developer smoke artifact is "explicitly tied to Phase 7" and generated by the Phase 7 summary generator (finalPlanSummary.mjs).
